tags.description: The summit (414 feet elevation) of Middle Island in King George Bay, West Falkland. Named after WATTS, Cpl. Laurence George. (Royal Marines - 42 Commando, Royal Marines)
tags.name: Lofty Watts Hill
tags.note: New placename in Nov 22 to mark 40th anniversary of the Falkland Islands conflict

tags.description: Prominent hill (550 feet elevation) southeast of Isthmus Cove on the north shore of Port Philomel, West Falkland. Named after SWEET, L/Cpl. Philip Anthony. (Army - 1st Bn. Welsh Guards)
tags.name: Sweet Hill
tags.note: New placename in Nov 22 to mark 40th anniversary of the Falkland Islands conflict

tags.description: Summit of Gid's Island in King George Bay, West Falkland. Named after SIMEON, Sgt. John Jamieson. (Army - 2nd Bn. Scots Guards)
tags.name: Simeon Hill
tags.note: New placename in Nov 22 to mark 40th anniversary of the Falkland Islands conflict
